name: Victoria Gold Corp.
description: Victoria Gold Corp. is a Canadian mining company that operates the Eagle Gold Mine, located on the Dublin Gulch property in central Yukon Territory, Canada. The Eagle Gold Mine is the largest gold mine in Yukon history and produces approximately 200,000 ounces of gold annually. The company is focused on the operation and expansion of the Eagle Gold Mine while continuing to explore its extensive land package in the Yukon. Victoria Gold is committed to high environmental and safety standards and maintains strong relationships with local communities and First Nations.
